1.premise: A homeless man's claim of weekend-only crack use implies discipline — and it happens to be the weekend.

lines.text: What's going on?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I've been traveling a lot lately.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: When I go to new cities, what I like to do is I like to buy weed.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I like to take that weed and go to parks.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I like to smoke that weed in parks, and I like to watch homeless people.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's how I judge how much I like the city.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I suggest y'all try it.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I was in Toronto, Ontario, Canada,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: not too long ago, any Canadians in here?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Boo, USA, USA, stay with me brother, USA.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I'm gonna start a clam rally in this bit.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: No, I was in Toronto, Ontario, Canada,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: smoking weed in parks, watching homeless people
lines.label: setup

lines.text: not bother nobody doing my thing.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I see this homeless man walking by himself.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: There's nobody else around him.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And he just says out loud,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I only smoke crack on the weekends.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And guess what, big daddy?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's the weekend.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: That's a five-star homeless man right there.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You mean to tell me you're a disciplined crack addict?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: It's like, hey Reggie, what you do tonight, baby?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You want some crack?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Nah, nigga, it's Tuesday.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Don't start my crack 'til Thursday, 11.58 p.m.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Thank you.
lines.label: fluff
